query:
SELECT campaignId, COUNT(*) as total,
  MIN(FROM_UNIXTIME(discoveredAt/1000)) as earliest,
  MAX(FROM_UNIXTIME(discoveredAt/1000)) as latest
FROM outreach_leads
GROUP BY campaignId;

SELECT id, campaignId, postTitle, status, FROM_UNIXTIME(discoveredAt/1000) as discovered
FROM outreach_leads
WHERE campaignId = 1
ORDER BY discoveredAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
